texto: I was always silly in high school. I used to always get in trouble because I was laughing. I've always thought I was funny but never thought I could use it to make money. In 1996, I decided I was going to use my humor to get on TV to make money.

texto: For Christmas I do gift bags for my friends and the cast, and I put 'treat yo self' key chains in there. And people send me pictures of 'treat yo self' all the time.

texto: I started once a week in North Carolina at a pub called Charlie Goodnight and met a lot of comics there. Then I moved to L.A., and if you're not known, it's hard to get stage time. So you start out doing what they call 'bringers' - you have to bring five people if you wanna get on stage. It was a lot of hustle, a learning curve.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Retta sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I started once a week in North Carolina at a pub called Charlie Goodnight and met a lot of comics…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, time, week, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: I started once a week in North Carolina at a pub called Charlie Goodnight and met a lot of comics there. Then I moved to L.A., and if you're not known, it's hard to get stage time. So you start out doing what they call 'bringers' - you have to bring five people if you wanna get on stage. It was a lot of hustle, a learning curve.

texto: 'Glee' is very easy to clown because I feel like it's just crumbling. 'Smash!' 'Smash' is the ultimate. I love it because I'm all about theater. I did plays in high school and college, and it totally brings me back to that feeling: how excited you get on opening night, how it sucks when you're not learning the dance moves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Retta: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “'Glee' is very easy to clown because I feel like it's just crumbling. 'Smash!' 'Smash' is the ult…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, love, dance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
